CreateCaptainAccount.title: Create driver account

DriverDocuments.title: Driver Documents
DriverDocuments.pcoLabel: PCO Driver Licence (TfL Private Hire Driver Licence)
DriverDocuments.pcoDescription: Upload the front of your Transport for London (TfL) Private Hire Driver Licence showing your name, badge number, expiry date, and photo. This is mandatory for all drivers.
DriverDocuments.dbsLabel: Enhanced DBS Certificate (Disclosure and Barring Service)
DriverDocuments.dbsDescription: Upload a recent Enhanced Disclosure and Barring Service (DBS) certificate issued within the last 6 months. This background check is required for passenger safety.
DriverDocuments.dvlaDescription: Upload clear photos of both the front and back of your UK Driver and Vehicle Licensing Agency (DVLA) driving licence showing all details including your photo, address, and licence categories.

BankDetails.title: Bank Details
BankDetails.AccountBankNumberDescription: Enter your UK bank account number (usually 8 digits) where you will receive payments
BankDetails.sortCodeDescription: Enter your 6-digit UK bank sort code (format: XX-XX-XX) which identifies your bank branch
BankDetails.RegistereDaddressDescription: Enter the address registered with your bank account (must match your bank records)

VehicleDocuments.title: Vehicle Documents
VehicleDocuments.VehicleNumberDescription: Enter your vehicle's registration number (number plate) as shown on your vehicle documents
VehicleDocuments.RegisterDescription: Enter the year your vehicle was manufactured (e.g., 2020)
VehicleDocuments.motDescription: Upload your latest MOT (Ministry of Transport) certificate confirming your vehicle has passed its annual safety inspection. Vehicles less than 6 months old are exempt.
VehicleDocuments.phvDescription: Upload your Transport for London (TfL) Private Hire Vehicle (PHV) licence. If you rent the vehicle, request this document from your vehicle operator.

modal.title: 📄 Thank you for submitting your documents.
modal.desc: We are currently reviewing them to ensure they meet the requirements. You will be notified once the verification is complete.

GetStartedCaptain.title: 👋 Welcome to Airport & City Transfer - Driver Onboarding
GetStartedCaptain.desc: Thank you for your interest in joining Airport & City Transfer, where professionalism, reliability, and great service come first. We’re excited to have you on board and look forward to working with you as part of our trusted driver network
GetStartedCaptain.supportTeam: our support team is here for you

DriverInstruction.title: Driver Instruction
DriverInstruction.subTitle: Become an ATG (Airport & City Transfer) Private Hire Driver
DriverInstruction.desc: Become a driver Becoming a driver with ATG (Airport & City Transfer) Private Hire Taxi Service can be a rewarding opportunity for those who enjoy driving and providing excellent customer service. To start, you'll typically need to meet certain requirements, such as having a valid driver's license and a clean driving record. Additionally, many private hire services require you to undergo background checks and possibly complete a training program to ensure you’re familiar with local traffic laws and customer service standards. Once you’re approved, you'll have the flexibility to choose your working hours, making it ideal for those seeking a flexible work schedule. As a driver with ATG, you'll be responsible for safely transporting passengers to and from the airport, ensuring timely arrivals and departures while providing a comfortable and friendly travel experience This role not only allows you to mee a variety of people but also offers the potential to earn a sustainable income through fares and tips.

Step_by_Step.title: Getting started - Step-by-Step Instructions and Requirements

desc.snap_2: to fill out the registration form and upload your required documents

step_2.title: 2. Download the Driver App
step_2.desc: You’ll receive a link to install our driver app on your smartphone. This is where you’ll accept bookings, view trip details, and receive payment summaries.

list: Valid TFL Private Hire Driver License (PCO)
Proof of right to Work in the UK (Passport or NIN)

step_4.title: 4.  Book an appointment to review your documents

dsec.sub: Once documents are approved, we’ll invite you to an onboarding session to review
list: Use of the driver app and dispatch system

step_6.title: 6. Start Earning
step_6.desc: After setup, you can start accepting jobs and earning straight away. Our system prioritises fair distribuation and transparent pricing

section_proud: to have you drive with us.
together - one journey at a time
